title: Built and managed a sports Fanpage reaching 10K followers in 4 months

description: Researched and updated football news on a daily basis.
Wrote 3–5 video scripts per day for football news content, published on Reels.
Created, wrote, and designed 2–4 posts/day (including posters/banners) aligned with brand identity
Managed Fanpage interactions, including responding to messages and engaging with users
Supported SEO team by publishing and sharing links to drive traffic to the app

results.text:
Reached 10,000 followers in just over 3 months.
Achieved an average of 15M+ monthly views on the Fanpage.
Generated conversions from social media to website/app traffic.

Researched and analyzed viral content to develop posts aligned with the Page’s target audience. Multiple posts reached over 2 million views, generating thousands of reactions and high engagement in comments.
Sourced information, developed scripts, and edited sports news content. Multiple videos exceeded 100,000 views, generating high audience engagement.

results2.text: Created visual materials for content initiatives, minigames, and events, ensuring consistency with brand guidelines.

items.text: Developed seasonal and thematic communication plans, emphasizing product highlights.
Developed content, created design briefs, and produced basic visual assets for product communication posts.
Ideated and wrote content for promotional campaigns, while developing design briefs and executing basic visual materials for marketing communications.
Researched concepts, developed content, created design briefs, and managed end-to-end minigame execution, including prize distribution, to drive engagement and increase Vico brand awareness.

Coordinated and executed product exhibition activities for AIG Group at trade fairs, including booth organization, customer consultation, event documentation, handling export paperwork, and producing post-event recap content.
Collaborated with the e-commerce team to host sales livestreams on TikTok, promoting a range of products including coconut water, milk, F&B mixes, and bakery items.

title: SEO Content Achieving Top Google Rankings

description: Conducted in-depth keyword research using tools such as Ahrefs and Google Trends to identify high-search-volume opportunities.
Developed structured content outlines based on primary and secondary keywords; produced high-quality.
Designed visual assets (images, thumbnails); reviewed, published content, and implemented on-page SEO to enhance performance

items.text: Conducted keyword research and produced SEO-optimized content achieving top rankings (Top 1–2 on Google,...)

title: Personal Project: TikTok Affiliate (~7M VND revenue)

description: Built and developed a TikTok affiliate channel focused on unboxing and product reviews.
Collaborated with brands to receive products; handled end-to-end production including scripting, setup, filming, editing, and voice-over.
Published content with affiliate links, achieving up to ~7M VND in revenue

items.text: Produced review videos with full execution, ensuring consistency in content quality and delivery.
Achieved up to 7M VND/month in affiliate revenue.
